title: Baseline SD-JWT VC EAA, no selective disclosure, no key binding
description: Smallest possible conformant SD-JWT VC EAA. The payload carries the mandatory JOSE and SD-JWT VC claims (vct, vct#integrity, iss, nbf, exp) but no selectively-disclosable attributes and no holder key binding. Useful as the floor case for verifier implementations.
payload: <placeholder: real signed sample to be produced in Phase 5>
